# nayatel_volume (Resource)

Manages a Nayatel Cloud volume.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `size` (Number) Size of the volume in GB

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description of the volume
- `image_id` (String) Image ID to create a bootable volume from
- `name` (String) Name of the volume
- `snapshot_id` (String) Snapshot ID to create the volume from
- `volume_type` (String) Type of the volume (e.g., ssd, hdd)

### Read-Only

- `bootable` (Boolean) Whether the volume is bootable
- `id` (String) Volume identifier
- `instance_id` (String) ID of the instance the volume is attached to (if any)
- `status` (String) Volume status (available, in-use, creating, deleting, error)
